label: Watchlist
description: Saved watchlists and symbol selection for the active underlying in options and futures views.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; WatchlistPanel is a pure UI component with no mock imports. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; watchlists are synchronous mock data. 0.7: Empty state handled — WatchlistPanel uses activeList?.symbols ?? [] (watchlist-panel.tsx line 76-80); empty symbol list renders an empty ScrollArea with no rows — no crash. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); WatchlistPanel has no async error path. 0.9: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

l0.notes: 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; WatchlistPanel is a pure UI component with no mock imports. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; watchlists are synchronous mock data. 0.7: Empty state handled — WatchlistPanel uses activeList?.symbols ?? [] (watchlist-panel.tsx line 76-80); empty symbol list renders an empty ScrollArea with no rows — no crash. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary); WatchlistPanel has no async error path. 0.9: No dead code or commented-out blocks in widget file.

1.1.note: Widget reads ctx.watchlists, ctx.watchlistId, ctx.setWatchlistId, ctx.selectedWatchlistSymbolId, ctx.handleWatchlistSelect exclusively via useOptionsData() hook. No inline fetch or mock import. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130); globalScope.organizationIds used to build scopedWatchlists (lines 273-279). 1.3: Org filter — when organizationIds is set and does not include 'odum', only crypto watchlists are shown (watchlist 'crypto-top', 'crypto-defi' etc. pass filter; 'tradfi-us' is excluded). Widget displays only the org-scoped watchlists, so org change visibly changes the available watchlist tabs. 1.4: clientIds not applicable to watchlist — symbol lists are not per-client filtered. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to watchlist symbol selection. 1.6: Empty organizationIds → scopedWatchlists === DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (all lists shown). 1.7: DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS defined in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — reference data (watchlist definitions) should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts or lib/constants/ in a future refactor.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads ctx.watchlists, ctx.watchlistId, ctx.setWatchlistId, ctx.selectedWatchlistSymbolId, ctx.handleWatchlistSelect exclusively via useOptionsData() hook. No inline fetch or mock import. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130); globalScope.organizationIds used to build scopedWatchlists (lines 273-279). 1.3: Org filter — when organizationIds is set and does not include 'odum', only crypto watchlists are shown (watchlist 'crypto-top', 'crypto-defi' etc. pass filter; 'tradfi-us' is excluded). Widget displays only the org-scoped watchlists, so org change visibly changes the available watchlist tabs. 1.4: clientIds not applicable to watchlist — symbol lists are not per-client filtered. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to watchlist symbol selection. 1.6: Empty organizationIds → scopedWatchlists === DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (all lists shown). 1.7: DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS defined in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — reference data (watchlist definitions) should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts or lib/constants/ in a future refactor.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS reference data lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — should be moved to lib/config/services/options.config.ts or lib/constants/options.ts.

findings.description: 1.7 — DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (watchlist symbol definitions) are defined in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock and imported into options-data-context. This reference data should be extracted to lib/config/services/options.config.ts or lib/constants/options.ts. Context file change, out of scope for widget cert.
